hero_match.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia (Day 1)

ranked_matches.title: PSL 2026: Lahore Qalandars vs Hyderabad Kingsmen

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is underway in Melbourne, with South Australia batting first after Victoria won the toss. The PSL 2026 season has also kicked off with the first match between Lahore Qalandars and Hyderabad Kingsmen.
